summary: Comprehensive testing of order_release movement type for Customer Inventory Ledger. All 14 backend tests passed covering: commit→release lifecycle, full release, over-release rejection (422), non-existent SO rejection (422), multi-line release, balance derivation formulas, and regression tests. Frontend UI tests passed: login, navigation, workspace cards, balance table columns, tabs, status badges.

issues: Minor React hydration warnings about HTML nesting (<tr> inside <span>, <span> inside <tbody>) - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/release - partial release lifecycle (seed 100, commit 50, release 30 → committed=20, available=80)
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/release - full release (committed becomes 0, available returns to on_hand)
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/release - over-release rejection → HTTP 422 with 'exceeds outstanding commitment' message
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/release - non-existent SO → HTTP 422 with 'no order_commitment found' message
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/release - release after full release rejected (nothing to release)
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/release - multi-line release (2 items in one request)
Backend: derive_balances - on_hand excludes BOTH order_commitment AND order_release movements
Backend: derive_balances - committed formula correct: abs(commitment_raw) + release_raw = 100 + (-30) = 70
REGRESSION: GET /api/inventory-ledger/customers - still lists workspaces (Hormel, Karlin, test workspaces)
REGRESSION: POST /api/inventory-ledger/customers/{id}/movements - opening_balance still works
REGRESSION: POST /api/inventory-ledger/customers/{id}/movements - order_commitment still works
REGRESSION: GET /api/inventory-ledger/customers/{id}/balances - still derives balances correctly
REGRESSION: GET /api/inventory-ledger/meta - includes order_release in movement_types
REGRESSION: POST /api/gpi-integration/sales-orders/preflight/{doc_id} - still returns inventory_summary and inventory_workspace
Frontend: Login with admin/admin works correctly
Frontend: Navigate to Inventory Ledger page
Frontend: Customer selector shows workspace cards (Hormel Foods, Karlin Foods, etc.) with policy badges
Frontend: Click workspace opens balance table
Frontend: Balance table shows all 9 required columns (ITEM, WAREHOUSE, OWNERSHIP, ON HAND, INCOMING, COMMITTED, AVAILABLE, UOM, STATUS)
Frontend: Status badges render correctly (SHORT in red, OK in green)
Frontend: Summary strip shows metrics (7 Items Tracked, 2,160 On Hand, 300 Incoming, 6,324 Committed, 3 Shortages)
Frontend: Tabs (Balances, Movements, Incoming) present and functional
seed_data_used: Each test creates unique items with UUID prefixes to avoid cross-test interference. Test workspace created per module with deactivation on teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Order release feature fully tested. Key formulas verified: (1) committed = abs(commitment_raw) + release_raw (both stored as negative deltas), (2) on_hand excludes both order_commitment and order_release, (3) available = on_hand + incoming - committed. Release endpoint POST /api/inventory-ledger/release validates commitment exists and prevents over-release with 422 errors. Existing ledger functionality (opening_balance, order_commitment, balances, preflight inventory) unchanged.

backend.release_validation: Validates commitment exists for SO+item, prevents release > outstanding committed (422)
backend.balance_formulas: committed = (-1 * commitment_raw) + release_raw, on_hand excludes commitment and release
backend.multi_line_release: Supports releasing multiple items in single request

frontend.inventory_ledger_page: Customer selector cards, workspace summary strip, balance table with all columns, tabs
frontend.status_badges: SHORT (red) and OK (green) badges render correctly
frontend.committed_column: Shows committed values derived from order_commitment minus order_release
